listitem.para: A patient wants to incorporate ginseng with prescriptive medication. What is your advice?
What evidence do you see with the “ethic of neutrality” among Appalachians or any other group or person?
Identify at least three health conditions common among Appalachians. What might you do to help decrease these conditions?
What tactics might you use to help decrease the high smoking rates among Appalachians?
How might you work with local community churches to teach health food practices and prevention of sexually transmitted infections?
How is fatalism displayed among Appalachians?
An overweight teenager is drinking 8–10 glasses of “sweet tea” on a daily basis. How might you encourage her to decrease the amount of “sweet tea” she drinks on a daily basis?

A close family friend whose spouse is dying of metastatic breast cancer tells you “I am wore out and don’t know how much more I can do.” What might you do to help your friend get some respite from this situation?
